ground_truth.title: Cyber Monday Cybersecurity Deals | Save on CrowdStrike Falcon
ground_truth.main_content: CrowdStrike Falcon Cyber Monday promotional page featuring three product tiers: Falcon Go at $59.99 per device (billed annually), Falcon Pro at $99.99 per device, and Falcon Enterprise at $184.99 per device. Each tier offers different levels of protection. Falcon Go includes next-gen antivirus, device control, mobile device protection, and express support. Falcon Pro adds firewall management to these features. Falcon Enterprise includes all features plus endpoint detection and response and threat intelligence with hunting. The page emphasizes that Cyber Monday is over but great security is available year-round. The Falcon platform is described as 100% cloud-based with easy installation, requiring no hardware or additional software. It is purpose-built to secure the AI era and harness agentic AI for cybersecurity. Customer testimonials are featured from Intel, Target, and Salesforce executives praising CrowdStrike's modern security stack and comprehensive protection capabilities.
with: Falcon Go includes next-gen antivirus, device control, mobile device protection, and express support.
The Falcon platform is 100% cloud based and doesn't require hardware, additional software, or configurations.
The Falcon platform is purpose-built to harness, operationalize, and scale agentic AI for cybersecurity.
CrowdStrike Falcon delivers continuous, comprehensive endpoint visibility and automatically detects and intelligently prioritizes malicious activity.
Annual price for Falcon Enterprise is $184.99 per device.
without: 100% detection. 100% protection. CrowdStrike excels in MITRE's most demanding platform evaluation yet.
